prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.2 kg; Height 170.5 cm; BMI 23.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.5%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 246mg/dL; 9 months ago 315mg/dL; 6 months ago 292mg/dL; 3 months ago 286mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 67.9kg; 9 months ago 69.8kg; 6 months ago 69.3kg; 3 months ago 69.9kg; current 69.2kg), Height (12 months ago 170.5cm; 9 months ago 170.5cm; 6 months ago 170.5cm; 3 months ago 170.5cm; current 170.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 23.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 144mmHg; 9 months ago 146mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 146mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 82U/L; 9 months ago 77U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 80U/L; current 79U/L), AST (12 months ago 109U/L; 9 months ago 102U/L; 6 months ago 108U/L; 3 months ago 99U/L; current 105U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 46mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 47mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 188mg/g; 9 months ago 209mg/g; 6 months ago 230mg/g; 3 months ago 333mg/g; current 290mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 122mg/dL; 9 months ago 137mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 120mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
